summary: Comprehensive testing of new Order Detail Drawer feature and marketplace badge updates completed. All 17 features tested and working correctly including: drawer opening from order ID click, drawer sections (header with status, order ID with copy, marketplace with logo, product, 5-step timeline, customer, shipping, package details, payment), drawer close methods (X button, backdrop click, Escape key), marketplace badges in table rows, and marketplace logos in channel selector.
passed_tests: Clicking order ID (75885999046732) opens order detail drawer from the right
Drawer shows 'Order Details' header with status badge (Pending/New)
Drawer shows Order ID with copy button - clicking copies to clipboard
Drawer shows Marketplace with logo and name (Amazon, Flipkart, Coupang)
Drawer Product section shows title, quantity, SKU
Drawer Order Timeline shows 5 steps: Placed, Confirmed, Packed (done), Shipped, Delivered (pending)
Timeline has visual indicators - completed steps show primary color, pending show muted
Drawer Customer section shows name, phone, address with icons
Drawer Shipping & Delivery shows method, ship by, deliver by, fulfillment
Drawer Package Details shows weight (400g), dimensions (17x15x7 cm), Package ID, Shipment ID
Drawer Payment section shows payment type (Prepaid/COD) and amount with status text
Drawer footer has Print Invoice (secondary) and Process Order (primary) buttons
X button closes drawer successfully
Clicking backdrop (overlay) closes drawer successfully
Escape key closes drawer successfully
Marketplace logo badge appears in Order Details column of each order row
All 6 marketplace logos render in channel selector (Amazon, Flipkart, Coupang, Snapdeal, Meesho, Myntra)
Coupang drawer shows 'New' status badge and Coupang marketplace logo/name
Flipkart drawer shows Flipkart marketplace logo/name
Drawer shows Korean Won currency (₩24,000) for Coupang orders
Drawer shows Rupee currency (₹1,200) for Amazon/Flipkart orders
additional_observations: Drawer slides in with smooth animation (0.25s ease-out)
All drawer sections have proper spacing and typography hierarchy
Status badges use marketplace-appropriate colors (amber for Pending/New, blue for Accepted, violet for Packed)
Payment section shows contextual message - 'Payment received' for Prepaid, 'Collect on delivery' for COD
Order timeline visually shows completed vs pending steps with icons
Marketplace badges in rows use appropriate brand colors (orange for Amazon, blue for Flipkart, red for Coupang)
critical_code_review_comments: OrderDetailDrawer component is well-structured with proper separation of sections
Escape key handler properly implemented with useEffect and cleanup
marketplaceNames export properly used for displaying human-readable names
Timeline data is currently hardcoded - could be dynamically generated from order status in future
seed_data_creation: All data MOCKED in OrdersPage.tsx using generateMockOrders() function
context_for_next_testing_agent: Order Detail Drawer feature fully tested. Drawer opens from clicking any order ID link (data-testid='order-link-ord-{marketplace}-{index}'). Drawer has data-testid='order-detail-drawer'. Close methods: X button (data-testid='drawer-close-btn'), backdrop (data-testid='drawer-backdrop'), Escape key. All drawer sections verified: Product, Order Timeline (5 steps), Customer, Shipping & Delivery, Package Details, Payment. Footer buttons: Print Invoice, Process Order. Marketplace badges appear in order rows with appropriate brand colors.

mocked_api_info.details: Entire app is UI-only. All order data is generated by generateMockOrders() function in OrdersPage.tsx. Timeline steps are hardcoded in timelineSteps constant.
